sections.location:
Downstairs: Detector is located outside downstairs bathroom door. 

Upstairs: Detector is located outside master bedroom door.
The water heater is located in the downstairs closet under the stairs.
The circuit breaker is located in the upstairs attic space which can be accessed through the master bedroom. When you enter the attic, its on the wall to your left.

The HVAC filters are located upstairs and downstairs. 

The upstairs HVAC grate is in the master bedroom against the back wall. 

The downstairs HVAC grate is on the ceiling outside the door to the downstairs bedroom.
The water meter is located around the side of the house.
There are no cameras on this property.
The thermostat is located on the wall to the left of the downstairs bedroom entrance.
The fire extinguisher is located under the kitchen sink in the cabinets.
